source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division — Postcards Collection
artist: E. W. Merrill (associated name on LoC card)
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — pre-1928)
title: [View of Sitka, Alaska]
description: Panoramic view of Sitka from the hills above the town, showing the crescent-shaped harbor, downtown buildings, and Mount Edgecumbe volcano in the background. Sitka was the capital of Russian America from 1808 to 1867.
alt: Circa 1900 sepia postcard panoramic view of Sitka, Alaska from the hills showing the harbor, town, and Mount Edgecumbe
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-12 — downloaded from tile.loc.gov and visually confirmed
